info.name: API Test Suite
info.description:
# SV Students Recommend | API Test Suite v3

בנוי לפי ה-OpenAPI spec האמיתי מ-/openapi.json.

**סדר הרצה:** Team 1 → Team 4 (כדי לקבל admin_token) → Team 2 → Team 3 → Team 5 → Teardown

## משתני סביבה נדרשים (מראש)
| Key | Example Value |
|---|---|
| `BaseURL` | `https://sv-students-recommend.onrender.com` |
| `name` | `Test Student` |
| `email` | `testuser@sv-test.dev` |
| `password` | `TestPass1234!` |
| `adminuser` | `hagai@svcollege.co.il` |
| `adminpass` | `test1234` |

## משתנים שנשמרים אוטומטית
`user_id`, `testuser_token`, `admin_token`, `rec_id`, `comment_id`, `blacklist_id`

item.name: Team 1 | Auth & Profile
item.description: POST /auth/register · POST /auth/login · POST /auth/recover · GET /api/profile/me · DELETE /api/profile/me · PUT /api/profile/password · GET /api/profile/token

exec: // Schema per OpenAPI: UserOut → {id, name, email, access_token}
if (res.id) { pm.environment.set('user_id', res.id); console.log('✅ user_id:', res.id); }
pm.test('Body matches UserOut schema: id, name, email, access_token', () => {

request.description:
**Schema:** UserRegister → name (required), email (required, format:email), password (required, min 4 chars)
**Response 201:** UserOut → id, name, email, access_token
**Response 422:** Validation error

exec: pm.test('Error detail is present in body', () => {

request.description: **Negative test:** שולח בלי שדה name שהוא required. מצפה ל-422.

if (res.access_token) { pm.environment.set('testuser_token', res.access_token); console.log('✅ testuser_token saved'); }

request.description:

**Response 200:** UserOut → id, name, email, access_token
**Response 401:** Invalid email or password

exec: pm.test('200 OK | reset email accepted', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

request.description:
**Schema:** PasswordResetRequest → email (required, format:email), redirect_to (default: '')
**Response 200:** {} (empty schema)

exec: // BUG NOTE: OpenAPI מגדיר response 204 No Content
// אבל הקולקשן המקורי בדק 2xx | 204 מחזיר גוף ריק לחלוטין
pm.test('204 No Content | password changed', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(204); });
pm.test('Response body is empty (204 = no body)', () => {

request.description:
**Schema:** PasswordChange → new_password (required, only field!)
⚠️ **BUG FOUND:** הקולקשן המקורי שלח גם `email` בבקשה, אבל PasswordChange schema מכיל רק `new_password`.
**Response 204:** No Content (גוף ריק)

exec: if (res.access_token) { pm.environment.set('testuser_token', res.access_token); console.log('✅ Token refreshed'); }
pm.test('200 OK | new password works', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

request.description: מאמת שהסיסמה החדשה תקינה ומרענן testuser_token.

**Auth:** Authorization header required
**Response 201:** RecommendationOut
**Negative test:** Authorization header הוא required לפי schema. ציפיה: 422 (missing required header) או 401.

request.description:
**Public endpoint**
**Response 200:** RecommendationOut

**Negative test:** UUID שלא קיים. מצפה ל-404.
⚠️ **BUG TO INVESTIGATE:** OpenAPI לא מתעד 404 בכלל לנקודת קצה זו | רק 200 ו-422. אם השרת מחזיר 404 בפועל, זה בעיה בתיעוד.

exec: pm.test('Description updated', () => { pm.expect(res.description).to.eql('Updated by API test suite'); });

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Test Movie | Updated",
  "category": "Book",
  "description": "Updated by API test suite",
  "recommender_name": "Team 2 Updated",
  "website_link": "https://example.com/updated"
}

**Auth:** Authorization header required
**Response 200:** RecommendationOut

item.name: Team 3 | Comments & Blacklist

request.description:
**Public endpoint | no auth required**
**Response 200:** Array of CommentOut → id, recommendation_id, commenter_id, commenter_name, rating, comment_text, created_at

exec: // CommentOut schema: id, recommendation_id, commenter_id, commenter_name, rating, comment_text, created_at
if (res.id) { pm.environment.set('comment_id', res.id); console.log('✅ comment_id:', res.id); }

request.description:
**Schema:** CommentCreate → rating (required, integer 1-5), comment_text (optional)
**Auth:** Authorization header required
**Response 201:** CommentOut

item.name: Teardown | Cleanup
item.description:
עקרון Clean Slate. סדר חשוב: comment → blacklist → recommendation → user.
כל בקשה מנקה גם את משתני הסביבה הרלוונטיים.

exec: pm.test('204 No Content | comment deleted', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(204); });

request.description:
**Auth:** comment author או admin
**Response 204:** No Content (גוף ריק)

**Admin only**
**Response 204:** No Content

exec: pm.test('204 No Content | account deleted', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(204); });
